mapper.sql: select p.post_id, p.user_id, p.content, p.images, p.likes_count, (select count(1) from lyh_post_comment c where c.post_id = p.post_id and c.del_flag = '0') as comments_count, p.visibility, p.status, p.del_flag, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.remark, coalesce(u.nick_name, su.nick_name) as nick_name, coalesce(u.avatar_url, su.avatar) as avatar_url from lyh_post p left join lyh_user_profile u on p.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_user su on p.user_id = su.user_id
mapper.insert:
insert into lyh_post
user_id, content, images, likes_count, comments_count, visibility, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark,
#{userId}, #{content}, #{images}, #{likesCount}, #{commentsCount}, #{visibility}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete: update lyh_post set del_flag = '2' where post_id = #{postId}

update lyh_post set del_flag = '2' where post_id in
#{postId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from lyh_post_like where post_id = #{postId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into lyh_post_like(post_id, user_id, create_time) values(#{postId}, #{userId}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from lyh_post_like where post_id = #{postId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update lyh_post set likes_count = likes_count + 1 where post_id = #{postId}
update lyh_post set likes_count = likes_count - 1 where post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: insert into lyh_post_comment(post_id, user_id, content, del_flag, create_time) values(#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, '0', sysdate())
mapper.update: update lyh_post set comments_count = comments_count + 1 where post_id = #{postId}
mapper.sql: select c.comment_id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.status, c.del_flag, c.create_time, coalesce(u.nick_name, su.nick_name) as nick_name, coalesce(u.avatar_url, su.avatar) as avatar_url from lyh_post_comment c left join lyh_user_profile u on c.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_user su on c.user_id = su.user_id
mapper.delete:
update lyh_post_comment set del_flag = '2' where comment_id in
#{commentId}
mapper.select:
select comment_id, post_id from lyh_post_comment where comment_id in
#{commentId}
